properties.needs_review:
SELECT 
    "id", 
    "user_id", 
    CAST("amount" AS VARCHAR) as "amount",
    "status",
    "timestamp",
    "category",
    'Needs_Manual_Review' as "quality_check",
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP as "nifi_process_time"
FROM FLOWFILE
WHERE "amount" IS NULL 
   OR CAST("amount" AS VARCHAR) = 'missing'
properties.valid_data:
SELECT 
    "id", 
    "user_id", 
    CAST("amount" AS VARCHAR) as "amount", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "status" = '???' OR "status" IS NULL OR "status" = 'Unknown' THEN 'Unknown' 
        ELSE "status" 
    END as "status",
    "timestamp",
    "category",
    'Processed_Success' as "quality_check",
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP as "nifi_process_time"
FROM FLOWFILE
WHERE "id" IS NOT NULL 
  AND "amount" IS NOT NULL 
  AND CAST("amount" AS VARCHAR) <> 'missing'
